items.example: We went sightseeing around Manhattan yesterday.
I want to see a show on Broadway while I'm in New York.
Let's visit the Natural History Museum on Saturday.
We are going to have a picnic by the river.
We went for a bike ride along the beach.
We took a walking tour of the old town.
I'm going to a concert at Madison Square Garden.
The gallery has a new exhibition of modern art.
I took lots of photos of the skyline from the top.
Let's go out for a meal tonight — I know a great place.
